heroSubtitleComplete: Matches are shown below. Reset to run another search.
heroSubtitleInitial: Upload face images to search enrolled persons by similarity (1:N).
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Each capture is added to the images for search.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and capture one face image
uploadSubtitle: Select one or more image files from your device
apiRefLinkSuffix: (Face Search — search by face image against enrolled persons).
apiRefBody: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send one or more raw base64 images of the same subject in images (no data URL prefix). Optionally scope with collection_id. The public docs recommend 1–3 images for better recall.
apiRefEndpointDesc: 1:N identification: returns candidate persons ranked by similarity score.
paramImagesDesc: Array of base64 face images (same person; up to ~3 suggested)
paramMaxResultsDesc: Cap on returned matches (API default applies if omitted)
bulletApiClient: This demo uses searchPerson from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bulletSignature: Responses typically include ranked matches and may include a signature block depending on environment.
